headline: AI-powered scam calls are getting more convincing—and more common: 'It was her voice, I know her scared cry'

headline: U.S. Senate Banking Committee moves to advance “Clarity Act” crypto framework
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. senators are preparing to consider a long-awaited regulatory framework for the cryptocurrency sector next week, a move that could break a legislative deadlock between digital asset firms and traditional banks.
